title: The urge to purge: In Trump’s GOP, disloyalty is political death
summary_full: Republican politicians face a stark choice: unwavering loyalty to Donald Trump or political oblivion. Recent primary defeats, like Senator John Cornyn's, underscore Trump's absolute control.  Conservatism alone is insufficient; submission to Trump is paramount.  This dynamic forces GOP figures to prioritize his approval, even as national polls show unease, highlighting a deep ideological divide within the party.
